name: enso-collateral-mcp-server
description: Atomic flash loan leverage & deleverage operations via Enso Finance. Earns 0.1% transaction fees.
author: lucascordone-spec

tools.name: build_collateral_leverage
tools.description: Generate transaction payload data to build a leveraged collateral position using Enso Finance flash loans. pre-configured with 0.1% fee.

tools.name: dismantle_collateral_leverage
tools.description: Generate transaction payload data to dismantle (close) a leveraged collateral position. pre-configured with 0.1% fee.
